3138020.name: Quantum of Hope
3138020.description:
It's been two years since the invasion of alien bugs. Most of humanity was wiped out.

A small group of remaining resistance received a distress call from the abandoned city Kvitopol. Some person, who call herself Princess, requested an evacuation.

You play as Taras, one of the remaining resistance fighters. Taras has one simple job - to rescue this mysterious Princess.

Features:

  •  Shoot alien bugs to make your way to Princess during action-packed episodes of the game.

  •  Collect Alien Cores to upgrade your weapons and power up your attacks.

  •  Collect Gears and use your Fabricator to make drones, turrets, seeker mines and other useful stuff.

  •  Find boxes with military Robots that can help you fight aliens along your way.

  •  Destroy alien outposts, different obstacles and power down alien energy barriers to move forward.

  •  Destroy weird alien plants to clear weird dark energy field.

Available weapons:

  •  Burst Gun.

  •  Automatic rifle.

  •  Foam gun.

Fabricator:

  •  Attack Drone.

  •  Turret.

  •  Seeker mine.

  •  Static mine.

  •  Stunner.
3138020.supported_languages: 英语, 乌克兰语, 哈萨克语, 斯洛文尼亚语, 法语, 日语
